content:
Sometimes, the best opportunities aren't a click away; they're a walk away. We're opening our doors in Gurugram and looking for talented professionals to join our Data Breach team. 

Join us at our Walk-In Drive in Gurugram from 3rd to 5th July as we hire 200 professionals for our Data Breach team. Come prepared, meet our hiring team, and discover where your next career could take you.

See you there!

Know someone who shouldn't miss this? Share this post with them.

#LDMGlobal #WalkInDrive #Gurugram #DataBreach #Hiring #HiringNow #Legal
